flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of Southern Nevada rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.8k → $4.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of Southern Nevada rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.5k → $13.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Southern Nevada fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of Southern Nevada rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (16.4% → 19.1%).
